task: Re-revision of Chapter 22 (final chapter) following audit gate failure
summary: Re-revised Chapter 22 to address all audit gate failures. Critical finding LINE-201 (negation-contrast saturation) resolved: reduced from 26+ to 10-11 instances (target 10-12). Major finding LINE-205 (near-verbatim grip passage) resolved: first passage completely rewritten. Four darlings cut (LINE-207, LINE-208). All copy-edit findings addressed including divine corpse→divine remains, Serath Dún→Dûn, Seventh→Sixth Seat, British→American spellings. Traceability chain restored with correct finding IDs. Three v1 regressions also fixed.
